events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: mixed neutrals/grounds in a subpanel creates an unauthorized downstream neutral-ground bond (violates NEC 408.40, 200.4, 250.24(A)(5)), producing a parallel current path that energizes normally non-current-carrying metal parts — a shock/fire hazard that can also defeat GFCI/AFCI protection. Marked `fail`, risk `high`, with immediate lockout/tagout, bar separation, re-testing, and re-inspection required before energizing.
